ctaComponent.title: Visit Agiasos
ctaComponent.subtitle: Discover the village
ctaComponent.message: Learn about the picturesque village of Agiasos in Lesbos, Greece. Explore its rich culture, traditions, and natural beauty.

about-page.description: Learn about Visit Agiasos, a social organization promoting the village of Agiasos and its unique culture in Lesbos, Greece.
about-page.title: Visit Agiasos
about-page.intro: We are a social organization (Urban Non-Profit Company), created to promote the village of Agiasos and its unique culture. Together with the help of our local volunteers in Agiasos we organize countless events all year round with the aim of promoting our beautiful village in Lesvos, education for all ages and the social well-being of our residents.
about-page.history-1: VisitAgiasos began as a grassroots initiative by a group of locals dedicated to preserving and promoting the cultural heritage, natural beauty, and traditional lifestyle of Agiasos, a picturesque village on the island of Lesvos in Greece. Originally, the organization focused on creating events and sharing stories about local customs to encourage tourism.
about-page.history-2: Over the years, it grew into a nonprofit organization that now works on a larger scale, engaging in community projects, offering educational workshops, and collaborating with local businesses to support sustainable tourism. VisitAgiasos has become a key player in connecting visitors with the local culture while fostering economic growth and protecting the environment.
about-page.history-3: Since its founding, VisitAgiasos has been committed to fostering collaboration with a wide range of institutions to carry out impactful projects aimed at sustainable tourism, cultural preservation, and community development. Over the years, we have partnered with esteemed organizations such as the Ministry of Labor, Social Security and Social Solidarity (Registry Department Κ.ΑΛ.Ο), the Ministry of Culture (Cultural Organizations, receiving three grants), and the University of the Aegean (Departments of Cultural Technology and Communication, and Sociology).
about-page.history-4: A major milestone for VisitAgiasos has been the successful implementation of the NSF (ΕΣΠΑ) 2014-2020 grant for Social and Solidarity Economy (Κ.ΑΛ.Ο) organizations. This program has allowed us to expand our reach and deepen our community impact, supporting a variety of projects focused on sustainable development, cultural preservation, and economic growth.
about-page.history-5: Our efforts have also been supported by the Spiritual Center Agiasos Reading Room «Η Ανάπτυξη», YouBeHero, Cowork4YOUTH, the Municipality of Mytilini, Eloris North Aegean, and the Molyvo Tourism Organization, particularly in initiatives like the 2023 Lesvos Food Festival.
about-page.history-6: Through these initiatives and the continued collaboration with our partners, VisitAgiasos remains dedicated to creating a lasting positive impact in Lesvos and the local community by preserving the traditions and culture of Agiasos for future generations.

footer.p: Visit Agiasos is a Social Cooperative Enterprise promoting the village of Agiasos, Lesbos, Greece.
